boilerplate: BuildKit MTG Meta Hub is unofficial Fan Content permitted under the Wizards of the Coast Fan Content Policy. Not approved/endorsed by Wizards. Portions of the materials used are property of Wizards of the Coast. (c) Wizards of the Coast LLC.

sets.methodology: BuildKit Draft Score = 0.75 * z(shrink(GIH WR, k=200)) + 0.25 * z(shrink(IWD, k=200)), computed from 17lands' public PremierDraft card_ratings (CC BY 4.0). shrink(x, n, k=200) = (n*x + k*mean(x over the pool)) / (n + k) is empirical-Bayes shrinkage toward the pool mean weighted by n = GIH game_count, so two cards with the SAME raw win rate but different sample sizes never tie: the low-sample card regresses harder toward the mean and cannot outrank the high-sample card. z(y) = (y - mean(y)) / population_stdev(y) is computed across EVERY card in the pool regardless of rarity -- rarity-neutral, no separate curve for commons vs mythics. Grade bands on the final score: S>=+1.25, A>=+0.5, B>=-0.25, C>=-1.0, D>=-2.0, else F; a card with no GIH data at all is 'unrated'. GIH WR = ever_drawn_win_rate, IWD = drawn_improvement_win_rate, ALSA = avg_seen, ATA = avg_pick, OH WR = opening_hand_win_rate -- 17lands' own field names, carried through unchanged. Per-color-pair rows use the identical formula computed over just that pair's card pool; a pair only publishes when 17lands' response for it is verifiably distinct from the set's overall response (seventeenlands.pair_data_is_distinct) -- 17lands' public no-auth endpoint does not currently filter by color pair for every set/pair combination, and a non-distinct pair is omitted rather than republished as fake per-pair signal. EARLY DATA -- upgrading as samples grow (153,122 total games so far). 17lands' color-pair filter returned no data distinct from the overall set this run, so pair_rows is empty rather than a duplicate of overall_rows.
attribution: Win rates via 17lands.com public card ratings (CC BY 4.0)

sets.methodology: BuildKit Draft Score = 0.75 * z(shrink(GIH WR, k=200)) + 0.25 * z(shrink(IWD, k=200)), computed from 17lands' public PremierDraft card_ratings (CC BY 4.0). shrink(x, n, k=200) = (n*x + k*mean(x over the pool)) / (n + k) is empirical-Bayes shrinkage toward the pool mean weighted by n = GIH game_count, so two cards with the SAME raw win rate but different sample sizes never tie: the low-sample card regresses harder toward the mean and cannot outrank the high-sample card. z(y) = (y - mean(y)) / population_stdev(y) is computed across EVERY card in the pool regardless of rarity -- rarity-neutral, no separate curve for commons vs mythics. Grade bands on the final score: S>=+1.25, A>=+0.5, B>=-0.25, C>=-1.0, D>=-2.0, else F; a card with no GIH data at all is 'unrated'. GIH WR = ever_drawn_win_rate, IWD = drawn_improvement_win_rate, ALSA = avg_seen, ATA = avg_pick, OH WR = opening_hand_win_rate -- 17lands' own field names, carried through unchanged. Per-color-pair rows use the identical formula computed over just that pair's card pool; a pair only publishes when 17lands' response for it is verifiably distinct from the set's overall response (seventeenlands.pair_data_is_distinct) -- 17lands' public no-auth endpoint does not currently filter by color pair for every set/pair combination, and a non-distinct pair is omitted rather than republished as fake per-pair signal. This set's 17lands card_ratings response totalled 97 ever-drawn games this run -- below the 5,000-game publish floor, so no rows are graded.
attribution: Win rates via 17lands.com public card ratings (CC BY 4.0)

Grade bands on the final score: S>=+1.25, A>=+0.5, B>=-0.25, C>=-1.0, D>=-2.0, else F; a card with no GIH data at all is 'unrated'. GIH WR = ever_drawn_win_rate, IWD = drawn_improvement_win_rate, ALSA = avg_seen, ATA = avg_pick, OH WR = opening_hand_win_rate -- 17lands' own field names, carried through unchanged. Per-color-pair rows use the identical formula computed over just that pair's card pool; a pair only publishes when 17lands' response for it is verifiably distinct from the set's overall response (seventeenlands.pair_data_is_distinct) -- 17lands' public no-auth endpoint does not currently filter by color pair for every set/pair combination, and a non-distinct pair is omitted rather than republished as fake per-pair signal. This set's 17lands card_ratings response totalled 156 ever-drawn games this run -- below the 5,000-game publish floor, so no rows are graded.
